title: Everbuild Pinkgrip Instant Grab Adhesive – Slump Resistant – External and Internal Use – 350ml, Pink (Pack of 4)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
VERSATILE – Suitable for use on brick, slate, steel, stone, fibre glass, plasterboards, brass, aluminium, cork, Perspex, and wood including MDF.
MULTI-USE – Suitable for a range of applications including attaching carpet grippers, insulation boards, coving, window frames, carpet trims, and stair edgings without nails or tacks.
HIGH-STRENGTH – Provides superior grab strength, removing the need to pin under or support the workpiece. Prevents slipping, slumping and eliminates the need for double-stick application methods.
REDUCED WASTAGE – Nips off easily to prevent messy stringing of the adhesive to unwanted areas. The pink adhesive can be overpainted if necessary.
EASY TO USE – Apply using a caulk, sealant/adhesive cartridge application gun. We recommend the Everbuild Power Pro Heavy Duty Sealant/Adhesive Cartridge Applicator Gun for best results.
description: From the manufacturer The surfaces to be glued must be clean, dry and free from dust, grease and other contaminants. Cut nozzle cleanly at an angle of 45 degree and pierce membrane, apply using a standard sealant gun. Apply a 6 mm bead in a zigzag along the length of the item to be fixed. Press into place and apply an even pressure onto the entire surface. Leave to cure for 24-48 hours. For extremely heavy items, provide temporary support whilst curing.
